types.h(3) Library Functions Manual types.h(3)

NAME

types.h - Log level types and constants.

SYNOPSIS

Enumerations


enum log_level_t { LOG_DEV = 0, LOG_DEBUG, LOG_INFO, LOG_WARN, LOG_ERROR, LOG_FATAL }
Logging levels enumeration.

Detailed Description

Log level types and constants.

Lightweight header containing only log level definitions. This header has NO dependencies to avoid circular inclusion issues.

Definition in file types.h.
